name: Frontend surface docs architecture refactor
description: Refactor the docs tree so `FRONTEND` becomes the parent router for multiple client surfaces, while shared product truth and surface-specific web/TMA docs move into separate canonical branches.

planned: Create the new surface-aware docs tree for product specs, frontend references, and design docs.
Rewrite router/index docs and current repo guidance so `FRONTEND` means all client surfaces, not only `web`.
Run docs-only verification and capture the final GitNexus blast radius before completion reporting.
artifacts: Replaced the old `FRONTEND = web` meaning with a parent-router structure: `docs/FRONTEND.md` now routes to `docs/WEB.md`, `docs/TMA.md`, and `docs/MOBILE_APP.md`.
Moved shared domain specs into `docs/product-specs/shared/`, web-only specs into `docs/product-specs/web/`, TMA-only specs into `docs/product-specs/tma/`, and added mobile-app stub indexes.

Moved frontend implementation leaves into `docs/references/frontend/web/` and `docs/references/frontend/tma/`, created child indexes, moved durable design docs into `docs/design-docs/shared/` and `docs/design-docs/frontend/{web,tma}/`, and rewrote current router/index/skill docs to the new paths.
verification: Validated `harness/feature_index.json`, `harness/features/feat-080.json`, `harness/features/feat-087.json`, `harness/features/feat-088.json`, and `harness/features/feat-089.json` with `python3 -m json.tool`; all parsed successfully.
Ran `./scripts/check_harness_size.sh`, which returned `Harness size checks passed`, and `git diff --check`, which returned clean with no whitespace errors.
Ran a stale-path scan across current docs and project-owned skills; it returned `stale-path-scan: clean` for the old flat product-spec and old frontend/tma reference paths.
Ran final `gitnexus_detect_changes(scope: 'all')`, which returned `LOW` risk with 203 changed symbols, 0 affected processes, and 78 tracked changed files in the docs-focused worktree.

notes: Docs-only architecture refactor. No runtime behavior changes are expected.
